holo_failure_evidence.description: Holo rescue lanes that completed but failed the rescue objective.

holo_rescue_evidence.description: Holo rescue lanes where pair-level result is considered rescue evidence, not patch validation.

packet_key_defects.description: Pairs with explicit packet/key quarantine or defect notes.

patch_validation_evidence.description: Runs labeled patch validation only; not fresh benchmark evidence.

solo_failure_evidence.description: Solo one-shot posthoc score rows from Batch001-Batch016 solo scout runs.

scope: Batch001-Batch016 Solo Failure Factory evidence only. Legacy 614 excluded. Blind-120 and Atlas excluded from candidate totals unless explicitly in SFF rescue artifacts.
